description: Two sisters Vi and Powder became separated by the new upcoming war between Zaun and Piltover. They must find their new path and choose a side.

title: Book 1: Water
description: Aang travels with his new friends across the Earh Kingdom in order to reach the North Water Pole to find a Master of the Waterbending.

title: Book 2: Earth
description: Aang continues his training as the Avatar, facing new challenges and adventures. The group confronts the Earth Kingdom's struggles, uncovers the secrets of the spirit world, and Aang delves deeper into his connection with the Avatar State, all while the Fire Nation intensifies its pursuit.

title: Book 3: Fire
description: Aang and his friends prepare for the ultimate showdown with the Fire Nation and its tyrannical ruler, Fire Lord Ozai. The group faces personal dilemmas and tough choices, while the world holds its breath, waiting for the Avatar's triumph and the restoration of balance.
The series tells the story of several people that were involved into the result of the catastrophe and their attempts to reduce consequences and find a reason of the explosion.

As four families—Nielsen, Doppler, Tiedemann, and Kahnwald—struggle with personal conflicts, they soon realize that their lives are intertwined through a time loop connecting 1953, 1986, and 2019. Jonas Kahnwald, a troubled teenager, discovers the existence of a hidden wormhole in the town's caves, revealing a sinister cycle of events that repeat every 33 years. As he delves deeper, he uncovers shocking truths about his own family, Winden’s past, and a secret society called Sic Mundus, which manipulates time for its own agenda.

As the time loop's complexities deepen, the characters navigate multiple time periods while confronting the impending apocalypse. Tensions rise, family bonds are strained, and the intricate web of time travel's consequences becomes even more convoluted.

In the final season, Winden faces its ultimate fate, and the characters must confront the origin of the time loop. Time travel takes them to different dimensions, and they strive to break the cycle to save their world from annihilation, all while exploring the timeless questions of destiny, free will, and the eternal battle between light and shadow.

The action begins in the unified Seven Kingdoms of Westeros as the long summer ends and winter draws near. Lord Eddard Stark is asked by his old friend, King Robert Baratheon, to serve as the Hand of the King following the death of the previous incumbent, Eddard's mentor Jon Arryn. Eddard is reluctant but receives intelligence suggesting that Jon was murdered. Eddard accepts Robert's offer, planning to use his position and authority to investigate the alleged murder. Meanwhile, on the eastern continent of Essos, the exiled children of House Targaryen, which Robert destroyed to claim the throne, are plotting to return to Westeros and unseat the 'usurper'. To this end, Viserys Targaryen arranges the marriage of his sister Daenerys to Khal Drogo, the leader of 40,000 Dothraki warriors, in return for the use of his warriors in invading Westeros. For her part, Daenerys just wants to find a safe refuge far away from King Robert's assassins and her brother's scheming ambition.

War rages across Westeros as five kings lay claim to the Iron Throne. Robb Stark seeks independence for the North, Stannis Baratheon battles for the throne, and Daenerys Targaryen seeks allies to reclaim her birthright. The shadow of an ancient threat looms larger in the North.

The struggle for power intensifies as chaos reigns in the Seven Kingdoms. Jon Snow explores beyond the Wall, while the Lannisters and Starks continue their deadly feud. Daenerys grows in strength and seeks an army to conquer Westeros, while a looming supernatural threat becomes more apparent.

The War of the Five Kings begins to wind down, but new threats emerge. Tyrion Lannister faces trial for his life, Jon Snow navigates leadership at the Wall, and Daenerys consolidates her rule in Slaver's Bay. Dark and powerful enemies continue to rise in Westeros.

Amidst the ongoing power struggles and machinations for the Iron Throne, Jon Snow becomes Lord Commander, Cersei faces her own challenges in King's Landing, and Daenerys contends with rebellion in Meereen. The White Walkers pose an increasingly dire threat to the realm.

The battle for control of the Seven Kingdoms escalates as Jon Snow and Sansa Stark seek allies, Daenerys sails for Westeros, and Cersei consolidates power in King's Landing. The threat of the White Walkers becomes a central concern, and prophecies and destinies are fulfilled.

The Great War looms as Daenerys and her allies set their sights on the Iron Throne. Jon Snow, now recognized as a Targaryen, must unite Westeros against the White Walker threat. Cersei Lannister retains her grip on King's Landing, creating a complex web of alliances and betrayals.

The battle for the Iron Throne reaches its climax as Daenerys, Jon Snow, and others confront their destinies. The White Walkers advance, and the living must unite against the impending doom. The fate of Westeros and its rulers is decided in a series of epic confrontations.
Clint meets new partner Kate Bishop who wants to became a hero like Hawkeye and start following him to find out truth about her family and help Clint to resolve his problems.

title: Volume 1: Genesis
description: Mohinder Suresh, a research geneticist, continues his late father's research into the biological source of the powers, while Noah Bennet represents, and is a lead agent for, a secret organization known only as "the Company" that wants to control, and if necessary, terminate those who are gifted. After only having a short time to come to terms with their new abilities, each of the heroes is drawn into the final showdown. They must each do their part to stop the destruction of the world that starts with an impending explosion at Kirby Plaza in New York City.

title: Volume 2: Generations
description: The characters continue to explore their powers while new individuals with abilities emerge. A global conspiracy and the hunt for a virus add to the intrigue as the heroes try to prevent a deadly outbreak.

title: Volume 3. Part 1: Villains
description: The heroes face new challenges as they confront government scrutiny and a malevolent villain, Arthur Petrelli. The discovery of dangerous abilities and a divided group of heroes complicate their mission to save the world from powerful threats.

title: Volume 3. Part 2: Fugitives
description: The heroes continue their journey, facing government forces and an ever-growing threat. A new organization, Building 26, seeks to control those with abilities, forcing the heroes into a fugitive lifestyle as they strive to protect themselves and others.

title: Volume 4: Redemption
description: The heroes deals with the carnage caused by a carnival of people with abilities. They must unite to thwart the carnival's leader, Samuel Sullivan, and face their destinies in an epic showdown.

Youngest Lock's sun Bode while discovering magical keys, find mysterious woman in a well that names Echo. She pledges Bode to rescue her, but it turns out that she is an ancient demon from other dimension that hunt for magical keys. Now Lock's family must protect their home and keys from the new menace.

The Locke family continues to explore the magical keys and their origins, leading to new challenges and threats. They face off against ancient enemies and strive to protect their family and the world from dark forces unleashed by the keys.

In this season, the Locke family must confront new and old enemies while dealing with the consequences of their actions. The fate of Keyhouse and the world hangs in the balance as they unlock more mysteries of the keys.
Loki with Morbius jumps across universes in order to capture Sylvie. Sylvia tries to destroy TVA to prevent vanishing timelines other than Scared Timeline.
Sherlock Holmes and Dr. John Watson become flatmates. Together, they tackle a series of perplexing cases, including a string of suicides that Sherlock believes are connected by a shadowy antagonist.

In the second season, Sherlock continues to astound with his deductive abilities, but he faces even more formidable adversaries. Moriarty, a brilliant and dangerous criminal mastermind, becomes his primary nemesis. The season is filled with high-stakes conflicts and intricate puzzles.

Season 3 explores Sherlock's return from a two-year absence, during which he was believed to be dead. The dynamic between Sherlock and Watson is tested as they confront new mysteries, including a wedding, a case of a disappearing train, and a deadly adversary from the past.

The fourth season delves deeper into Sherlock's complex personal life and his troubled past. It features an enigmatic new villain, Culverton Smith, and a series of cases that bring Sherlock to the brink of despair. Dark secrets and unexpected revelations surface, challenging the detective like never before.

In the 1980s, a young boy named Will disappears in Hawkins, Indiana. His friends Mike, Dustin, Lucas, Will's mother Joyce, and Sherif Jim Hopper embark on a quest to find him while uncovering supernatural mysteries. The arrival of a sinister force known as the Demogorgon leads to a parallel dimension known as the Upside Down.

In the second season, a year after the events of the first season, Hawkins faces a new supernatural threat. The group of friends reunites to confront a shadowy entity that threatens the town, and they learn more about the Upside Down. Eleven, the psychokinetic girl, seeks her past and abilities.

Set during the summer of 1985, Season 3 follows the group of friends as they face new challenges, both supernatural and personal. The town's new mall hides a dark secret, and the Russians play a significant role in the unfolding mysteries. The Mind Flayer returns, and Hawkins is once again in grave danger.
Darkness returns to Hawkins just in time for spring break, igniting fresh terror, disturbing memories — and an ominous new threat.

After arrival on Earth, young people discover that some humans survived the apocalypse: the Grounders, who live in clans locked in a power struggle; the Reapers, another group of grounders who have been turned into cannibals by the Mountain Men; and the Mountain Men, who live in Mount Weather, descended from those who locked themselves away before the apocalypse. Under the leadership of Clarke and Bellamy, the juveniles attempt to survive the harsh surface conditions, battle hostile grounders and establish communication with the Ark.

The survivors of the previous season continue to explore the Earth, but they face new threats, including warring factions, an artificial intelligence known as A.L.I.E., and a mysterious underground society known as the Grounders. Their fight for survival intensifies as they discover the truth about the Ark's survival on Earth.

The conflict between the Arkers and the Grounders escalates as the threat of the AI A.L.I.E. becomes more pronounced. The group must navigate political intrigue and ethical dilemmas as they strive to save humanity from a looming apocalypse.

With the impending nuclear apocalypse threatening to wipe out all life on Earth, the characters must work together to find a solution. Tensions rise as the group faces difficult choices and scientific challenges in a race against time.

Six-year after, survivors face new dangers on Earth, including a mysterious Eligius Corporation group and an overgrowing valley called the Shallow Valley. The conflicts between the various factions continue to test loyalties and survival skills.
Survivors discover a habitable planet named Sanctum. However, they soon realize that this new world holds its own mysteries and challenges, and the search for answers continues.

The characters face the ultimate test as they confront the aftermath of previous events and a powerful alien force. The stakes are higher than ever as they strive to save humanity and secure the future of their species.

The Flag Smashers, an anti-patriot group, believes the world was better during the Blip and is fighting for open national borders. The Falcon and the Winter Soldier try to stop them and protect the piece.

title: Book One: Air
description: Kora embarks on her journey to master airbending in Republic City. She faces the Equalists, a group led by Amon that seeks to rid the world of bending. As she learns more about the complexities of being the Avatar, she must restore balance and peace.

title: Book Two: Spirits
description: Korra faces new challenges as she delves into the spirit world and discovers the origins of bending. Civil unrest in Republic City and the appearance of dark spirits escalate the conflict. She must learn the ancient art of energybending and connect with her spiritual side.

title: Book Three: Change
description: Korra faces the Red Lotus, a dangerous anarchist group that seeks to end the Avatar cycle. As she confronts formidable adversaries, she must rebuild the Air Nation, rediscover herself, and make challenging decisions for the world's future.

title: Book Four: Balance
description: The final season follows Korra as she deals with the aftermath of her traumatic battles. She faces Kuvira, an Earth Empire military leader who seeks to unite the Earth Kingdom. As Korra grapples with physical and emotional scars, she strives to bring balance to the world.

Din Djarin, a lone Mandalorian bounty hunter, as he takes on various jobs across the galaxy. His life changes when he is tasked with capturing a mysterious child, later known as Grogu. Instead of handing the child over to the remnants of the Empire, Din chooses to protect him, making himself a target. Throughout the season, he battles bounty hunters, Imperial forces, and other enemies while forming alliances with characters like Cara Dune, Greef Karga, and Kuiil. The season ends with Moff Gideon revealing the Darksaber, setting up future conflicts.

The Mandalorian continues his journey with Grogu, searching for other Mandalorians who can help him return the child to its people. Their quest leads them to encounters with familiar and new characters, as well as deeper involvement in the events of the broader Star Wars galaxy.

As Beth grows older, she rises through the ranks of the competitive chess world, defeating top players while battling personal struggles, addiction, and loneliness. Her journey takes her to international tournaments, culminating in a high-stakes match against the Soviet champion, Vasily Borgov. Along the way, she finds friendship and support, ultimately proving herself as one of the greatest players in the world.

A dysfunctional family of adopted super-powered siblings reunites after the mysterious death of their adoptive father. They must work together to solve the mystery and prevent an impending global apocalypse while dealing with their own complex relationships and personal issues.

The second season sees the siblings time-travel to the 1960s, where they must once again prevent a doomsday event. Each sibling faces new challenges and adventures in a different era, all while trying to reunite and make sense of the temporal chaos they find themselves in.
Back at the Academy, the Umbrellas clash with a new squad of Hargreeves siblings as a mysterious force begins to wreak havoc on the city.

Geralt crosses paths with Yennefer, a powerful sorceress, and Ciri, a young princess with a destiny tied to his own. The three destinies converge in a world where the line between good and evil is blurred.
Geralt embraces his destiny as he protects Ciri from the forces battling for control of the Continent — and from the mysterious power she possesses.
The mysterious woman sneaks into Wanda's virtual world in pursuit of her power. Also, Monica Rambeau, a member of S.W.O.R.D. tries to save people inside a strange dimension.
